package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsTlsConfigBuiltPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_network_calls_tls_config_built_per_request"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Network calls. Flag TLS configuration construction per request instead of reusing immutable configs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
